rationale: The two papers strongly overlap on core constructs (chronic promotion/prevention regulatory focus in consumer research), and the citing paper’s tasks explicitly include product adoption outcomes, which is the cited paper’s central domain. Given this topical and methodological proximity—and the cited paper’s substantive findings on regulatory focus effects in new-product adoption—this looks plausibly theory/method relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention, despite only DOI-level matched reference evidence.
